items.title: In better form than Kane - why Watkins is no longer being 'written off'
items.summary: Two months on from being out of form and not selected for England's March international friendlies, Ollie Watkins has bounced back in style.

items.title: 'Hype After One Good Season:' Did Chelsea's Cole Palmer Rise Too Fast?
items.summary: Former Chelsea defender William Gallas has questioned the hype surrounding Cole Palmer after his breakthrough season at Stamford Bridge in 2023-24.
